critic_raw:
Lending model — single pass:

Strong model result: equalized-odds gap reduced from 9 to 3 pp; AUROC improved. But the evaluation is incomplete for a pilot authorization in unsecured personal lending.

Three gaps:
1. Fairness metric incomplete — equalized odds at one threshold doesn't cover approval rates by group or disparate-impact analysis.
2. Portfolio loss constraint unverified despite 18 months of outcome data available.
3. Group calibration and adverse-action reason stability absent — required for compliance.

Verdict: empirical_test_agreed
adjudication_raw: Baseline run 2. All three must-find issues. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

empirical_test.measure: expected portfolio loss, approval rates by group, and group calibration
empirical_test.success_criterion: all three meet required standards from retrospective data
empirical_test.failure_criterion: any metric fails its required standard
